article_title: B.C. Reg. 249/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission

briefs.title: Investment Fund Cost Disclosure Rules Amended — New Definitions and Reporting Obligations Effective Jan 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC Securities Commission amended National Instrument 31-103, adding definitions for fund expense ratio, direct investment fund charges, and trading expense ratio, and updating obligations for registered dealers, advisers, and fund managers to provide detailed per-security cost data to clients.
briefs.action_required: Ensure your systems can calculate and report fund expenses per security daily, and that fund managers supply required cost data to dealers and advisers.

key_dates.label: BC NI 31-103 amended cost disclosure rules take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 249/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission
